name: scaffold-mypets-basic
prompt: Scaffold a MyPets module with pt_ prefix
expected_behavior: Creates modules/pets/ directory with package.json, tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts
Creates src/definition.ts with PETS_MODULE ModuleDefinition using id 'pets', prefix 'pt_'
Creates src/db/schema.ts with pt_pets and pt_settings tables
Creates src/db/crud.ts with createPet, getPets, getPetById, updatePet, deletePet, countPets
Creates src/models/schemas.ts with PetSchema and Zod validation
Creates src/models/types.ts with Pet, CreatePetInput, UpdatePetInput types
Creates src/index.ts barrel export
Adds 'pets' to ModuleId type and ModuleIdSchema in packages/module-registry/src/types.ts
Creates apps/mobile/app/(pets)/_layout.tsx with BackToHubButton and tab navigation
Creates apps/mobile/app/(pets)/index.tsx placeholder home screen
Creates apps/web/app/pets/layout.tsx and apps/web/app/pets/page.tsx
Creates src/__tests__/pets.test.ts with definition, CRUD, and settings tests
Runs pnpm install, typecheck, and tests to validate

name: scaffold-mytrails-feature-rich
prompt: Create new MyTrails hub module for hiking tracking with trail logs and gear lists. Use tr_ prefix, hiking boot emoji, accent color #8B4513, premium tier.
expected_behavior: Creates modules/trails/ with full package scaffolding
Creates src/definition.ts with TRAILS_MODULE, id 'trails', prefix 'tr_', accent '#8B4513'
Schema includes tr_trails primary table plus tr_trail_logs and tr_gear tables
CRUD functions for Trail entity: createTrail, getTrails, getTrailById, updateTrail, deleteTrail
Additional CRUD or stubs for trail logs and gear as secondary entities
Zod schemas include TrailSchema with hiking-relevant fields (distance, elevation, difficulty)
Registers 'trails' in ModuleId type and ModuleIdSchema enum
Mobile layout has tabs for Home, Trails, Gear, Settings
Web page shows MyTrails title with hiking boot emoji theme
Tests cover module definition, schema migration, and Trail CRUD

name: scaffold-mynotes-simple
prompt: Add a MyNotes module to the hub
expected_behavior: Asks the user for missing details: table prefix, icon, accent color, tier
After gathering info, creates modules/notes/ with standard package files
Creates src/definition.ts with NOTES_MODULE using the provided metadata
Schema has nt_ (or user-chosen prefix) notes and settings tables
CRUD for Note entity with title and content fields
Zod NoteSchema includes id, title, content, createdAt, updatedAt
Registers 'notes' in module registry types
Creates mobile and web route placeholders
Creates test scaffold verifying definition and basic CRUD
Validates with typecheck and test run
